chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-247 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 04.03.2025 Mr. Ali Gul Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Agha Athar, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Shamsuddin Rajper files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.10 and 11, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under the instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that he will approach the Anti Encroachment Tribunal, in view of objection raised by Superintendent Anti Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
